pageDescription: Your About Me bio, elevator pitch, and strengths summary — generated from your career data, ready to copy into LinkedIn, your resume header, or use in person.

voiceGuide.title: Voice Guide
voiceGuide.description: Optional style preferences — tone and word choice — applied to every About Me, Elevator Pitch, and Strengths generation below, so the output sounds like you instead of a generic AI assistant.
voiceGuide.placeholder:
Tone: calm, professional, confident, humble
Avoid: passionate, thrilled, amazing, cutting-edge, results-driven
Prefer: "I enjoy..." instead of "I'm passionate about..."; "my experience has allowed me to..." instead of "I excel at..."

aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.description: A short professional bio — a few sentences summarizing who you are and what you do best.

elevatorPitch.title: Elevator Pitch
elevatorPitch.description: A 30-60 second spoken introduction — who you are, your standout strength, and what you're looking for next.

strengths.title: Strengths
strengths.description: A summary of what sets you apart — patterns across your skills, experience, and stories that a single job title wouldn't show.

placeholder: Generate with AI, or write your own {title}…

guidedQuestions.hint: Answer any of these before generating to get a richer, more personal draft. Left blank, generation uses only your career data.

shared.origin: What first drew you to this field, or how did your path start?
shared.teamRole: What's a strength or role you naturally take on within a team?
shared.curiosity: What are you curious about or learning right now, even outside your main job?
shared.lookingFor: What kind of role or opportunity are you looking for next?

strengths.teammateFeedback: What's a skill or way of working that colleagues or teammates specifically point out about you?
strengths.crossDomain: Where have you connected knowledge from two very different fields to solve a problem?
strengths.teamStuck: When a teammate is stuck, what do you naturally do?
strengths.hiddenSkill: What's something you're good at that isn't obvious from your job title or resume?

resumeDefaults.title: Resume defaults
resumeDefaults.description: Education and contact info saved here are prefilled into every resume you generate, so you never retype them.

aiSettings.title: AI settings
aiSettings.description: Optional: use your own Google Gemini API key. When set, your AI features run on your key — and keep working even if the platform's AI engine is offline.
aiSettings.hint: Get a free API key at
